age.error_rule: mark error when age text indicates infant/newborn/neonate or mapped/reported max age is below 1 year
age.no_imputation_rule: do not derive mean or SD from ranges, and do not derive min or max from mean/SD

gender.stored_as: male proportion decimal in [0,1] without percent sign

ethnicity.notes: A-F correspond to the six most frequent normalized ethnicity labels in the current dataset

occupation.stored_as: single standardized occupation label or label list

social_status.stored_as: single code or code list string such as [1,2]

severity.stored_as: single code, code list string such as [2,1], or original text when unmapped
